name: Crockpot Italian Beef & Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lean ground beef and drain well.
2. Add the dried potatoes from the scalloped potato mix and pizza sauce to the crockpot.
3. Stir in the canned tomatoes, water, oregano, basil, and garlic powder.
4. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 5 hours.
5. Turn the setting to high, then stir in the cubed mozzarella cheese.
6. Cover and cook for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
7. Serve with garlic bread and a green salad.
